---
title: "Resume"
author: "Vincent Gentry"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
---

## Contact

| | |
|---|---|
| **Email** | vincentgentry10@gmail.com |
| **LinkedIn** | https://www.linkedin.com/in/vincent-gentry-50a272384/ |
| **GitHub** | github.com/Vgentry10 |
| **Location** | Lake Stevens, Washington |

---

## Education

**Bachelor of Science — Data Science**  
Brigham Young University – Idaho | Expected Graduation: [2027]  
GPA: [3.56]

Relevant Coursework: DS 250 (Data Science Programming), 

---

## Skills

**Programming Languages:** Python, SQL  
**Libraries & Tools:** Pandas, Polars, NumPy, Scikit-learn, lets-plot, Jupyter, Quarto  
**Data Skills:** Data wrangling, exploratory analysis, machine learning, data visualization  
**Other:** Git/GitHub, VS Code, Microsoft Office

---

## Projects

### DS 250 Portfolio — Data Science Programming
*BYU-Idaho | [Semester Year]*

- Completed 5 units of data science projects using Python, Pandas, and machine learning
- Built predictive models using Random Forest and Decision Tree classifiers (scikit-learn)
- Analyzed the Star Wars Survey dataset; cleaned and visualized results to draw insights
- Created a public portfolio website using Quarto and GitHub Pages: [vgentry10.github.io/DS-250-Portfolio-](https://vgentry10.github.io/DS-250-Portfolio-/)

---

## Work Experience

**Overnight Inventory Associate**  
Home Depot, Lake Stevens, WA | Jun 2023 – Sep 2023 

Night shift inventory associate, unloading and organizing product to prepare for next day's business. 
Jun 2023 – Sep 2023 
● Disassembled palets and accurately sorted products into designated locations, ensuring efficient store organization. 
● Scanned and tracked inventory levels across aisles to support timely replenishment and prevent stock shortages. 
● Maintained clean and organized facilities, creating a positive environment for customers and a smooth transition for morning shift 
teams. 

**Staging Assistant**  
Village East Apartments, Lubbock, TX  | Summers 2020-2022

Staged and prepared living areas for prospective tenants from Texas Christian University (TCU).                                
● Staged and assembled apartment furnishings to create inviting, market-ready spaces. 
Summers 2020-2022 
● Replaced lighting fixtures, filters, and furniture (chairs, tables) to maintain functional, aesthetica ly pleasing environments. 
● Performed quality assurance by identifying and addressing broken appliances and other maintenance issues to ensure optimal 
apartment condition. 
● Maintained cleanliness of interiors and exteriors, including stairwe ls, offices, and living areas, ensuring a pristine, welcoming 
atmosphere.

---

## About Me

I am a Data Science student at BYU-Idaho with a passion for turning raw data into meaningful insights that drive real-world decisions. My career goal is to work as a data analyst or machine learning engineer and ideally in a role where I can build predictive models and interactive visualizations that help organizations solve complex problems. Outside of data science, I enjoy hiking the Pacific Northwest trails near my home in Lake Stevens, and writing personal story projects that blend creativity with narrtive problem solving.
